prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock LS2 (6.0L Gen IV, 242kW) with a stroked LS7 (7.0L, 427ci) using a Callies DragonSlayer crankshaft (4.125" stroke), Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (12.5:1 CR), and Manley H-beam connecting rods. Pair with a custom camshaft from Cam Motion (236/242 duration, .624/.624 lift, 114 LSA) for aggressive NA power delivery.

Forced Induction: Install a ProCharger F-1X centrifugal supercharger (10-12psi) with a custom intercooler setup featuring a Garrett bar-and-plate core (1200cfm) and dual 4" silicone couplers. Use a custom fuel system with ID1000 injectors, a Walbro 450LPH pump, and a Holley Dominator ECU for precise tuning.

Drivetrain: Swap the stock T56 6-speed for a Tremec TR-6060 (from a C6 Corvette) with a twin-disc McLeod RST clutch (800ft-lb capacity). Strengthen the rear end with a Moser Engineering 9" housing, 35-spline axles, and a Detroit Truetrac differential (3.73:1 gears).
estetica: Body Kit: Install a custom VZ-specific Rocket Bunny widebody kit (flares extended 3" per side) with carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser. Use a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the hood and roof.

Wheels: Fit Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 (19x10 +15 front, 19x12 +25 rear) with Nitto NT05R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear). Add custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive stance.

Interior: Replace stock seats with Recaro Pole Position buckets (cloth/Alcantara) and install a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in). Add a Motec C127 dash display with AIM MXS Strada data logging and a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel.
